prompt: In the context of structure-based drug design, generate a tight-binding protein binder targeting PDCD1 (Immune checkpoint) expressed by Homo sapiens. The binder should achieve nanomolar affinity. specify a protocol for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using AlphaFold2, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Please include key design considerations and expected challenges.
source_citation: Derived from open_targets (24.06); target: PDCD1; organism: Homo sapiens; catalogue version v1.0
